commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared memory-wiki helper that preserves existing human Notes blocks when regenerating local-ingest and imported-source pages, plus regressions for marker, heading, CRLF, and imported-source cases.

PR surface: Source +58, Tests +329. Total +387 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows both affected writers overwrite existing source pages, and the PR body includes before/after real on-disk output showing notes lost on base and preserved after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; this PR is ready for ordinary maintainer review and normal merge gates.
